addi $t0, $t0, 1              0x21080001  00100001000010000000000000000001
j frog                        0x08000004  00001000000000000000000000000100
addi $t0, $t0, 5              0x21080005  00100001000010000000000000000101
srl $t0, $t0, 1               0x00084042  00000000000010000100000001000010
beq $t0, $t0, test            0x1108FFFB  00010001000010001111111111111011
